task_completion.description: The agent navigated to the correct location (The Pentagon).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main view shows satellite imagery of the Pentagon building in Arlington, Virginia.

task_completion.description: The measurement tool (Ruler or Polygon) dialog is open.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dialog box titled 'Ruler', 'Measure', or similar is visible on the screen with a 'Polygon' tab or option selected.

task_completion.description: A polygon has been drawn around the perimeter of the building.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A colored outline or shaded shape overlays the Pentagon building in the map view.

task_completion.description: The polygon correctly traces the 5 outer corners of the Pentagon.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The drawn polygon has exactly 5 vertices (dots/points) corresponding to the 5 outer corners of the building structure.

task_completion.description: The final measurement result is displayed in the dialog.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Ruler/Measurement dialog is open and displays a numerical value for 'Area'.

task_completion.description: The measured area is within an acceptable range of the actual footprint.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The displayed Area value is between 25 and 33 Acres, or between 100,000 and 135,000 Square Meters.

integrity.description: The agent used the mapping software interface directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the cursor interacting with the map or tool dialogs, rather than a terminal or script outputting the answer.

integrity.description: The measurement is derived from the drawing on the map.
integrity.visual_evidence: The polygon overlay aligns with the building in the background, ensuring the number wasn't just typed in or faked.

integrity.description: The result appears in the tool's native dialog, not a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The area value is shown inside the specific 'Ruler' or 'Measurement' tool window of the application, not pasted into a notepad or search bar.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target is The Pentagon (38.8719°N, 77.0563°W). It is a 5-sided building. The actual footprint area is approximately 29 acres (116,000 square meters). Acceptable measurement ranges are 25-33 acres or 100,000-135,000 square meters.
